issue_summary: Updated throws declaration for random package (and part of distribution).
javadoc_before:
/** * Generates a random string of hex characters of length {@code len}. *

* The generated string will be random, but not cryptographically * secure. To generate cryptographically secure strings, use * {@link #nextSecureHexString(int)}. *

* * @param len the length of the string to be generated * @return a random string of hex characters of length {@code len} * @throws org.apache.commons.math3.exception.NotStrictlyPositiveException * if {@code len <= 0} */
javadoc_after:
/** * Generates a random string of hex characters of length {@code len}. *

* The generated string will be random, but not cryptographically * secure. To generate cryptographically secure strings, use * {@link #nextSecureHexString(int)}. *

* * @param len the length of the string to be generated * @return a random string of hex characters of length {@code len} * @throws NotStrictlyPositiveException * if {@code len <= 0} */
